embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

footer.text: 💡 20 pages total — use the dropdown to navigate

fields.value:
🔧 **Utilities** — `>ping`, `>uptime`, `>dm`, `>invitecount`
⚙️ **Server Config** — `>config`, `>setchannel`, `>setstaff`
🌍 **Global Config** — `>globalconfig` (week dates)
📊 **Reports & Automation** — `>autoconfig`, `>force*`, away immunity
fields.name: 🔧 Core

fields.value:
👥 **Staff Stats** — `>staffstats`, `>compare`, `>streak`, `>activitytimeline`
🔮 **Predictions** — `>predictions setup/end/cancel/live/vote/myvotes`
💰 **VBucks** — `>vbucks`, `>vbucksredeem`, `>vbuckstransfer`, `>vbucks set`
🌊 **Wave Points** — `>wavepoints`, `>wpshop`, `>wpset`, `>pointstovbucks`
🏦 **Central Bank** — `>bank`, `>bankfee`, `>bankinject`, `>bankinterest`
⚡ **Power Hour** — `>powerhour`, `>cancelpowerhour`
fields.name: 📈 Activity & Currencies

fields.value:
🗺️ **Loot Routes** — `>addroute`, `>lootroutedone`, `>cancelroute`, rotation tools
👁️ **Drop Map Reviewing** — `>newday`/`>endday`/`>closeday`, `>addpoints`, penalties, milestones
🗳️ **Drop Map Voting** — `/addvoting`, `>VotingToggle`, `>VotingClear`, `>VotingPick`, `>EndVoting`, `>VotingReset`, `>VotingRewards`, `>ToggleStickyMessage`
fields.name: 🎯 Reviewing, Routes & Voting

fields.value:
🖼️ **Image Editor** — `>editimage`, `>fnmap`, `>upscale*`, `>wmtest`
📧 **DM Reply System** — `>replydm` group (auto-DM config)
👥 **Manual Duties** — `>setduty`, `>setdivisor`, `>getduty`, `>dutyinfo`
🎭 **Role Sync** — `>dutyrolegive`, `>dutyroleremove`, `>staffrolegive`, `>staffroleremove`
🔧 **Maintenance** — `>bothealth`, `>poolstats`, `>vacuum`, `>ratelimitstats`
💾 **Database Tools** — `>clear*` commands ⚠️ (destructive)
fields.name: 🛠️ Operations

embeds.description:
Pick a category from the **dropdown below**.
Each page lists every command in that area, grouped by role.
Type `>adminhelp` for this menu, or `>help <command>` for one command's details.
embeds.title: 📚 Admin Help — All Systems

footer.text: 💡 No role restriction — open to all who can run commands

fields.value:
`>editimage` — Watermark + smart logo placement
　aliases: `>edit` / `>watermark` / `>stamp`
*Roboflow detects drop spot → center text + bottom-left wave logo*

`>wmtest` — Diagonal watermark tile ONLY (no logos/grunge/vignette)
　aliases: `>watermarkonly` / `>wmonly`
fields.name: 🎨 Watermark & Logo Stamp

fields.value:
`>fnmap <fortnite.gg link>` — Render at max quality
　aliases: `>mapfromlink` / `>fnggmap`
*Headless Chromium 4K, strips UI, auto-crops to markers (~70 sec)*
fields.name: 🗺️ fortnite.gg Map Rendering

fields.value:
`>upscale2x` — Fast 2x anime model (~10-30s)
　aliases: `>2x` / `>fast` / `>upscalefast`

`>upscale4x` — Max-quality 4x anime model (~1-3min)
　aliases: `>4x` / `>upscale` / `>enhance` / `>hd` / `>max` / `>anime`
*Best for stylized / game maps*

`>upscalephoto` — 4x photo-realistic model (~3-6min)
　alias: `>photo`
*Best for real photographs*
fields.name: 🚀 AI Upscaling (Real-ESRGAN)

embeds.description: All image processing commands. Attach an image when running.
embeds.title: 🖼️ Image Editor — Watermark, Render & Upscale

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
